purpose: Sector-first soundtrack catalog. All shipped runtime music cues currently use curated CC0 Bach masters by Kimiko Ishizaka from the Open Well-Tempered Clavier and Open Goldberg Variations projects.

notes: All 22 shipped music cues now use curated CC0 piano masters by Kimiko Ishizaka, including the local proustian_trigger excerpt derived from the Goldberg Aria.
Primary source pools: Open Well-Tempered Clavier and Open Goldberg Variations.
Legacy synthesis tooling remains in the repository for experimentation and fallback regeneration: FluidSynth 2.x + FluidR3_GM with music21 corpus scores.
Track provenance is recorded in assets/audio/ATTRIBUTION.md.
